description_long: This is a tall, rectangular retail display kiosk branded with Nescafé and Nespresso logos, designed for product showcasing in urban environments. The structure features four open shelves, each labeled with the Nescafé logo, providing ample space for product placement. The front panel displays a large printed advertisement with a coffee capsule and a bird, while the top header prominently features the Nespresso logo. The sides are solid with additional branding and visual graphics, and the back is plain and unadorned. The kiosk is constructed primarily from metal and plastic, with a glossy printed finish for visual appeal and durability.
description: A tall, rectangular Nescafé-branded retail display kiosk with four open shelves and prominent printed graphics, designed for product showcasing.
description_view_0: The back view shows a plain, solid panel with no visible branding or openings.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the depth of the shelves, side branding, and the vertical Nespresso logo at the top.
description_view_2: The front view displays four open shelves, Nescafé logos, and a large printed advertisement with a coffee capsule and bird.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, showing shelf depth, side graphics, and the vertical Nespresso logo.
attribute_signage_type: Printed sign and logo; Nescafé and Nespresso branding on front header, shelves, and side panels; large printed advertisement with coffee capsule and bird on lower front.
attribute_roof_design: Flat top with a vertical header panel for branding; no overhangs or decorative elements.
attribute_architectural_style: Modern commercial display with minimalist branding and clean lines.
